segments.speaker: Matt
segments.text: Compitum routes under hard resource limits.
segments.spoken_text: Compitum routes under hard resource limits.

segments.speaker: Matt
segments.text: It had shadow prices, but did not let them choose.
segments.spoken_text: It had shadow prices, but did not let them choose.

segments.speaker: Ellie
segments.text: FabricPC asked: can hidden scarcity become a routing price?
segments.spoken_text: Fabric P C asked: can hidden scarcity become a routing price?

segments.speaker: Ellie
segments.text: The proposed chain ended with price choosing action.
segments.spoken_text: The proposed chain ended with price choosing action.

segments.speaker: Matt
segments.text: Even exact belief failed when one local price was multiplied by a lumpy action.
segments.spoken_text: Even exact belief failed when one local price was multiplied by a lumpy action.

segments.speaker: Matt
segments.text: The predictor was not the whole problem. The steering rule itself was wrong.
segments.spoken_text: The predictor was not the whole problem. The steering rule itself was wrong.

segments.speaker: Ellie
segments.text: The correction prices the whole action.
segments.spoken_text: The correction prices the whole action.

segments.speaker: Ellie
segments.text: It compares future value before spending with future value after spending.
segments.spoken_text: It compares future value before spending with future value after spending.

segments.speaker: Ellie
segments.text: The discrete unit charges telescope to the same two lookups: exact charge, not a tangent.
segments.spoken_text: The discrete unit charges telescope to the same two lookups: exact charge, not a tangent.

segments.speaker: Matt
segments.text: Immediate utility minus action charge now ranks choices exactly like Bellman.
segments.spoken_text: Immediate utility minus action charge now ranks choices exactly like Bellman.

segments.speaker: Matt
segments.text: Certified choices and utility matched. Mismatches: zero.
segments.spoken_text: Certified choices and utility matched. Mismatches: zero.

segments.speaker: Ellie
segments.text: At one reachable state, belief point zero five selects spend; point two zero selects opportunity.
segments.spoken_text: At one reachable state, belief point zero five selects spend; point two zero selects opportunity.

segments.speaker: Ellie
segments.text: This proves an action change, not the threshold.
segments.spoken_text: This proves an action change, not the threshold.

segments.speaker: Matt
segments.text: The fixed FabricPC predictor did not clear its gate.
segments.spoken_text: The fixed Fabric P C predictor did not clear its gate.

segments.speaker: Matt
segments.text: Predictive coding tied backprop at point three one four: fifteen point four percent of the recoverable gap.
segments.spoken_text: Predictive coding tied back prop at point three one four: fifteen point four percent of the recoverable gap.

segments.speaker: Ellie
segments.text: The intervention restored exact action pricing.
segments.spoken_text: The intervention restored exact action pricing.

segments.speaker: Ellie
segments.text: The model lost. The experiment succeeded.
segments.spoken_text: The model lost. The experiment succeeded.
